_comment: Reference config for humans/CI — lint-core.mjs derives its rules from ../components.json + ../tokens.json, NOT from this file. Profile: utility-first (Django templates + UnoCSS).

_excludeRationale.templates/wireframes/: Prototyping mockups, never served by Django — pre-manifest Tailwind default palettes (amber/green/blue/red). Design scaffolding, not production instances.
_excludeRationale.templates/500.html: Standalone server-error page — must render when the static pipeline (and thus tokens.css) is down, so its inline hex is load-bearing correctness, not a token violation.
